question.label: Stretch opportunities
question.name: What would actually stretch you right now — is there a project or area you want to dive into?
question.description: Identifies potential areas for growth and engagement that could address current lack of stretch.

answer: Nothing big. A lot of context-switching on reviews — probably fine, but it adds up.

assessment.note: Describes context-switching on reviews as adding up, indicating mild lack of growth/stretch.

new_queue.label: Context-switching impact
new_queue.name: When you mention context-switching on reviews adding up, what's the main impact on your work or focus?

new_queue.label: Priority alignment
new_queue.name: Do you feel aligned with the team’s current priorities?

new_queue.label: Energy sustainability
new_queue.name: Is the current workload sustainable for you?

history.answer_excerpt: Cleanup and docs for payments, reviewing PRs for the new team members. Not much stretching me right now.
Last two weeks were intense — shipping payments was a sprint but it landed clean. Mostly good energy but definitely coasting a bit this week
